codeReview.summary: The fix-test-infrastructure feature correctly addresses the SQLite locking issue by adding a test script with --maxWorkers=1 flag to ensure sequential test execution, and properly adds vitest as an explicit devDependency. The services.yaml test command was simplified since the --maxWorkers=1 flag is now in the package.json script.

summary: Review passed. The fix correctly implements the required changes: 1) Added 'test': 'vitest run --maxWorkers=1' script to packages/server/package.json, 2) Added vitest as explicit devDependency, 3) Simplified .factory/services.yaml test command. Worker verified all 223 tests pass when Maildev is running and typecheck/lint both pass. No issues found.
